chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 495 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 17.11.2023 Mr. Imam Bux Mari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – Learned Counsel after arguing at some length does not press this application and submits that directions may be issued to the trial Court to examine the witnesses within a short period, then put applicant at liberty to move a fresh application for bail. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has not opposed this proposal. 2. Accordingly, this application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to examine material witnesses within two months without fail, where after, in any case, the applicant would be entitled to file a fresh application before the trial Court, which shall be decided independently on its own merits. 3. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
